name: Anceder
short_description: Dive in the VR arcade shoot-them-up (shmup, shoot'em up, bullet hell). A lot of action is awaiting you. "Insert coin" and jump in the shmup !
detailed_description:
Update Notes

2.3.3 + World 2,4 & 5 difficulty adjustement. Now you can trigger BigBonus in World 2 2.3.0 + Bunch of things, months of updates in once. 1.6.5 + Enemy bullets more visible + Fury Mode => +1 megabomb (so you have +2 in hard fury) - Bug OVR + splash + shadervariants 1.6.4 + Fixed bug where green "recenter" circle keeps appearing when no controller is plugged in. + Fixed bug camera Up/down on triggers 1.6.2 + Ship customization order (paint before color) - Power Ups text backward + New Unity & Oculus Runtime 1.6.1 + OpenVR - Fall vibrations 1.6.0 + NEW World 5 + NEW two more wingmen + NEW visual effects ships, impacts, explosions, menus, missiles + Boss W1 et W2 changed + Help loading - cinema Mode 1.5.9 + NEW Inventory for upgrades + NEW Stop Shooting aspires magnets + NEW magnets count + More SP in W1 & W4, seq W4+, easier boss W4 + More explosions + Score save mechanics - Some bugs 1.5.8 + New Corridor PBR & Lights + Non VR cam improvement 3 (Accueil, Calib, & Game) + Misc changes (bullet color, missile collider, ray unlit) + TouchScreen Control - Bug Music W3 1.5.7 + Non VR Camera improvement 2 + Missile Trail 1.5.6 + Non VR mode + Débris adjustements + PlayerShoot adjustements 1.5.5 + World 1 décor + Ships moves & collisions + Memory & CPU optimization + New Menu + New Success representation + Débris 1.5.4 + Oculus library update - Bug return to menu 1.5.3 + W3 music mix + Bullets + ShaderV 1.5.2 + World 3 graphic update. 1.5.1 + Dual wingmen + Graphic changes + Music World 1 mix + Loading % 1.5.0 + NEW Introducing Magnets + Some animations & sequence changes + Menu reorganization + Preparing world 5 arrival. 1.4.9 + Home Music Remix + World 4 Sas music 1.4.8 + NEW Scores now saved on servers 1.4.7 + NEW Major graphic improvements 1.4.6 + NEW Introducing customization menu + NEW Introducing wingmen + explosions improvement + Some ships design + More enemies + Some lighting


About the Game

Bienvenue in the VR arcade shoot-them-up (shmup, bullet hell). Choose your ship and try to make the best score. The "MORE" Update : Now with more bonus, more sounds, more languages (Spanish & Chinese texts), more fun ! The Fury mode is now easier. - Play the five worlds in a row to make a high score. - Original musics in HD. Music are level-long (no repetitive loops). - Normal and hard mode. You will make huge scores in hard mode. - Try the fury mode for an even faster game. - Playable with joypad or touch. - Scores saved worldwide (if connected to the internet). You can set initials to each score to compare with your visiting friends. - You can play lying in bed (see options menu or pause menu). A bug or idea ? Please write to cedric@anceder.com or twitter @ancedergame
about_the_game:
Bienvenue in the VR arcade shoot-them-up (shmup, bullet hell). Choose your ship and try to make the best score.

The "MORE" Update : Now with more bonus, more sounds, more languages (Spanish & Chinese texts), more fun ! The Fury mode is now easier.

- Play the five worlds in a row to make a high score.
- Original musics in HD. Music are level-long (no repetitive loops).
- Normal and hard mode. You will make huge scores in hard mode.
- Try the fury mode for an even faster game.
- Playable with joypad or touch.
- Scores saved worldwide (if connected to the internet). You can set initials to each score to compare with your visiting friends.
- You can play lying in bed (see options menu or pause menu).

A bug or idea ? Please write to cedric@anceder.com or twitter @ancedergame
supported_languages:
English*, French*, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
